pokemonsCard.name: Bulbasaur
pokemonsCard.description: A seed Pokémon that stores energy in its plant bulb and blooms as it grows.

pokemonsCard.name: Ivysaur
pokemonsCard.description: A stronger, leaf-covered Pokémon that is preparing to bloom into Venusaur.

pokemonsCard.name: Venusaur
pokemonsCard.description: A powerful Pokémon whose flower releases a calming aroma and bright energy.

pokemonsCard.name: Charmander
pokemonsCard.description: A small fire lizard whose tail flame burns brighter when it is happy.

pokemonsCard.name: Charmeleon
pokemonsCard.description: A fierce Pokémon that grows more aggressive and powerful as it fights.

pokemonsCard.name: Charizard
pokemonsCard.description: A flying dragon-like Pokémon whose fiery breath can melt almost anything.

pokemonsCard.name: Squirtle
pokemonsCard.description: A playful turtle Pokémon that sprays water from its shell to protect itself.

pokemonsCard.name: Wartortle
pokemonsCard.description: A loyal warrior with fluffy ears and a tail it uses like a boomerang.

pokemonsCard.name: Blastoise
pokemonsCard.description: A tank-like Pokémon with water cannons that fire powerful jets.

pokemonsCard.name: Pikachu
pokemonsCard.description: A friendly electric mouse that stores electricity in its cheeks.

pokemonsCard.name: Eevee
pokemonsCard.description: A curious Pokémon with the ability to evolve into many different forms.

pokemonsCard.name: Snorlax
pokemonsCard.description: A giant, sleepy Pokémon that can block roads when it naps.
